title: Plan
description: Canonical plan schema for structured implementation plans. Flat, executor-friendly design with max 3 nesting levels.

summary.description: High-level summary describing what is being implemented and why, with quantified scope items.

context.description: What is being implemented and why. Provides background and motivation for the plan.

scope_items.description: Quantified list of deliverables or work areas. Each item describes a concrete piece of scope.

items.description: A single scope item with optional quantification metadata.

count.description: Optional quantification (e.g. '3 files', '~50 lines'). Omit if not applicable.

category.description: Optional category label for grouping scope items (e.g. 'refactor', 'feature', 'test'). Omit if not applicable.

skills_mcp.description: Optional skill and MCP server recommendations for the execution agent. Omit if none are needed.

skills.description: Skill names the execution agent should activate (e.g. 'frontend-angular', 'test-driven-development').

mcps.description: MCP server names the execution agent should use (e.g. 'context7', 'angular-mcp').

parallel_plan.description: Optional list of work units for parallel execution (RFC-009 Phase 4). Each work unit defines an isolated edit area and dependencies. Omit if the plan is sequential.

items.description: A work unit that can be executed in parallel with other independent units.

id.description: Unique identifier for this work unit (e.g. 'wu-1', 'auth-module').

description.description: Human-readable description of what this work unit accomplishes.

edit_area.description: Files and directories this work unit is allowed to modify.

paths.description: Exact file paths this work unit may modify.

directories.description: Directory prefixes this work unit may modify files within.

depends_on.description: IDs of work units that must complete before this one can start. Empty array or omit if independent.

steps.description: Ordered implementation steps. Each step describes a concrete action the executor should perform.

number.description: Step number, starting from 1. Steps are executed in this order.

title.description: Short imperative title for this step (e.g. 'Add validation to input handler').

step_type.description: Category of work: 'file_change' for source edits, 'action' for commands/config, 'research' for investigation. Values: file_change, action, research.

priority.description: Optional importance level. Values: critical, high, medium, low. Omit if not applicable.

targets.description: Optional list of files this step creates, modifies, or deletes. Omit for research or non-file steps.

items.description: A file targeted by this step.

path.description: Relative file path from the repository root.

action.description: What to do with the file. Values: create, modify, delete.

location.description: Optional hint about where in the file(s) the change should be made (e.g. 'near the import block', 'after the validate() method'). Omit if not applicable.

rationale.description: Optional explanation of why this step is needed. Omit if obvious from the title and content.

content.description: Detailed step description. May contain markdown for formatting (code blocks, lists, etc.).

depends_on.description: Optional list of step numbers that must be completed before this step. Omit if no dependencies.

items.description: A step number this step depends on.

critical_files.description: Files central to this plan, split into files being changed and files used as reference.

primary_files.description: Files that will be created, modified, or deleted by this plan.

path.description: Relative file path from the repository root.

action.description: What will happen to this file. Values: create, modify, delete.

estimated_changes.description: Optional estimate of change magnitude (e.g. '~20 lines added', 'major rewrite'). Omit if unknown.

reference_files.description: Optional list of files consulted but not modified. Omit if none.

items.description: A reference file used for context.

path.description: Relative file path from the repository root.

purpose.description: Why this file is referenced (e.g. 'contains trait definition to implement').

risks_mitigations.description: Known risks and their mitigations. Every plan must identify at least one risk.

severity.description: Optional severity level. Values: low, medium, high, critical. Omit if unknown.

mitigation.description: How the risk will be mitigated or addressed.

verification_strategy.description: How to verify the plan was implemented correctly. At least one verification method is required.

method.description: The verification method (e.g. 'cargo test -p ralph-workflow', 'manual review of output').

expected_outcome.description: What a passing result looks like (e.g. 'all tests pass', 'no compiler warnings').
